notes.note: Etruscan town on the southern road into Cisalpine Gaul, near the boundary of the province; site of the triumvirs' summit conference of April 56 BC. Castronius is described as its leading citizen (longe princeps).

Ordo: the senatorial order, in which Cicero as an ex-consul held high seniority. To say a knight respects no one of that order more diligently than Cicero is the conventional language of equestrian deference to a senatorial patron.
